---
name: Feature request
about: A new recognizer, operator, transport, integration, or capability.
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What

One or two sentences describing the feature.

## Why

The concrete use case. What can you not do today, or what is awkward to
do, that this would fix? Links to a real document type, regulation, or
upstream API are more persuasive than abstractions.

## What done looks like

How would you verify this works? A sample input + expected output, a
test case, an `curl` invocation, or a bench corpus entry are all good
shapes. If the feature touches the analyzer or the bench, note which
corpus you'd expect a delta on.

## Alternatives considered

What you tried, or which workarounds exist today. If you've looked at
how other tools (Presidio, GLiNER, etc.) handle this, mention it — we
read those too.

## Out of scope

Optional: anything closely related that you specifically do *not* want
bundled in.
